title: argilla
summary:
✨ Open-source tool for data-centric NLP. Argilla helps domain experts and data teams to build better NLP datasets in less time. 
 Argilla Build high quality datasets for your AI models Argilla is a collaboration tool for AI engineers and domain experts who need to build high-quality datasets for their projects. If you just want to get started, deploy Argilla on Hugging Face Spaceshttpsdocs.v2.argilla.iolatestgettingstartedquickstart. Curious, and want to know more? Read our documentationhttpsdoc

title: cleanlab
summary:
The standard data-centric AI package for data quality and machine learning with messy, real-world data and labels. 
 Documentation Examples Blog Research Cleanlabs open-source library helps you clean data and labels by automatically detecting issues in a ML dataset. To facilitate machine learning with messy, real-world data, this data-centric AI package uses your existing models to estimate dataset problems that can be fixed to train even better models. Improve reliability across supervised lear
